task_completion.description: Log into the Artifactory web interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Artifactory web UI is open in a browser at localhost:8082, and the user is logged in (e.g., admin profile visible or dashboard displayed).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Repositories Import page
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Import & Export' -> 'Repositories' page is visible within the Administration module of Artifactory.

task_completion.description: Configure the import settings with the correct repository and path
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Import Repository from Path' section, the 'Target Local Repository' dropdown is set to 'example-repo-local' and the 'Import Path' field contains '/home/ga/repo-import-data'.
A success notification (e.g., 'Import completed successfully') or an active import progress indicator is visible after clicking the Import button.

task_completion.description: Verify the imported artifacts are visible in the repository
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Artifacts' page is visible in the Application module. The tree view shows 'example-repo-local' expanded, revealing the 'org/apache/commons/commons-lang3' and 'org/apache/commons/commons-io' folders or their respective jar and pom files.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser GUI to perform the import
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Artifactory web interface in a browser, rather than using curl or terminal commands to perform the import.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Artifactory application
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show genuine navigation through the Artifactory UI menus and dialogs, not a text editor or static mockups.

integrity.description: Artifacts are genuinely displayed in the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: The artifacts in the tree view appear naturally integrated into the Artifactory UI without signs of browser developer tools (Inspect Element) being used to fake the display.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target repository: 'example-repo-local'. Import source path: '/home/ga/repo-import-data'. Expected artifacts to be visible after import: 'org/apache/commons/commons-lang3' and 'org/apache/commons/commons-io' (specifically versions 3.14.0 and 2.15.1, including .jar and .pom files). Admin credentials: admin / password.
